title: fragariastrum caulescens
intro: Fragariastrum caulescens, also known as the strawberry shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Fragariastrum caulescens include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. Fragariastrum caulescens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
